
### secrecy properties  {.smaller}


* actually that's not secret enough, usually want to resist <br> recovery of info about message [or key]{.fragment fragment-index=2 .custom .myem-only} even given… 
<hr class="vspace" />
* [partial info about the message]{.fragment fragment-index=3 .custom .myem-only}, or
* [lots of other (message, ciphertext) pairs]{.fragment fragment-index=4 .custom .myem-only}, or 

   * ‘‘known plaintext’’

* lots of (message, ciphertext) pairs for <i>[other messages the attacker chooses]{.fragment fragment-index=5 .custom .myem-only}</i>, or 

   * ‘‘chosen plaintext’’

* lots of (message, ciphertext) pairs encrypted under similar keys, or 

   * ‘‘related key’’

* …
